method_en: Five sequential layers: (L1) money map + (L2) indicator dictionary are a curated KB; (L3) live flow diagnosis is pure-quant from yfinance + FRED (keyless fredgraph.csv) + defillama; (L4) retail-vs-institution split + AI-market mapping and (L5) scenarios/triggers/falsification are synthesized by Claude on each refresh (rules fallback if no API key). Seed values let the dashboard render offline.
method_zh: 五層循序：(L1)資金地圖 +(L2)指標字典為策展知識庫；(L3)即時流向診斷純量化,取自 yfinance + FRED(免 key 的 fredgraph.csv)+ defillama;(L4)散戶vs機構拆解 + AI 市場映射、(L5)情境/觸發/證偽,每次刷新由 Claude 綜合(無 API key 時走規則 fallback)。種子值讓儀表板可離線渲染。

reservoirs.name_zh: 現金 / 貨幣市場基金
reservoirs.role_en: Sidelined dry powder; the marginal fuel for risk assets.
reservoirs.role_zh: 場邊乾火藥;風險資產的邊際燃料。

indicators.rising_zh: 流動性注入

indicators.rising_en: Cash parked at Fed (drains net liquidity)
indicators.rising_zh: 資金停在 Fed(抽乾淨流動性)
財政部從市場抽走現金
貨幣成長支撐風險

reservoirs.role_en: Gravity for all risk assets; rates set the discount rate.
reservoirs.role_zh: 所有風險資產的地心引力;利率決定折現率。

indicators.rising_zh: 避險/利率下降
信用風險偏好仍在

indicators.rising_en: Higher discount rate — headwind for gold & AI valuations
indicators.rising_zh: 折現率上升 — 黃金與 AI 估值逆風
無風險利率上升
信用壓力 — 早期 risk-off 警訊

reservoirs.role_en: Safe haven & anti-fiat hedge; inverse to real yields.
reservoirs.role_zh: 避險與抗法幣對沖;與實質利率反向。

indicators.rising_zh: 避險買盤(貶值/實質利率下降)

reservoirs.role_en: Risk-on liquidity sponge; stablecoin supply = crypto dry powder.
reservoirs.role_zh: risk-on 流動性海綿;穩定幣供應 = 加密乾火藥。

indicators.rising_zh: 散戶/投機風險偏好上升
加密乾火藥進場

reservoirs.role_en: The main risk reservoir; breadth shows participation.
reservoirs.role_zh: 主要風險蓄水池;廣度顯示參與度。

indicators.rising_zh: 大盤偏risk-on
廣度 — 普遍參與
成長/科技買盤
散戶投機代理
景氣循環/廣度風險偏好
恐慌上升 — 避險需求

reservoirs.role_en: Where the AI thesis is priced; concentration & capex live here.
reservoirs.role_zh: AI 論點定價之處;集中度與 capex 在此。

indicators.rising_zh: AI 基礎設施需求買盤

reservoirs.role_en: Strong USD drains global liquidity, pressures risk & gold.
reservoirs.role_zh: 美元走強抽乾全球流動性,壓制風險資產與黃金。

indicators.rising_zh: 美元走強抽乾全球流動性

retail_vs_institution.summary_en: Retail appetite 33.3 sits BELOW institution 37.5, divergence −4.2 with no topping flag — institutions are the marginal buyer, not the crowd, which is the healthy configuration (the dangerous one is retail-hot/institutions-raising-cash). Risk appetite is broad: ARKK +8.6%, IWM +8.53%, RSP +4.14% all participating, VIX −1.04 and HY OAS −0.17 calm. The one crack is crypto/stablecoins: BTC −10.3%, stablecoin supply −2.32% — speculative leverage is bleeding even as equity beta rallies. So no blow-off froth yet, but the marginal speculative dollar has already left crypto.
retail_vs_institution.summary_zh: 散戶情緒33.3低於機構37.5，背離−4.2且無見頂警示——邊際買盤是機構而非散戶，屬健康結構（危險型態為散戶過熱、機構抽現金）。風險偏好廣泛：ARKK +8.6%、IWM +8.53%、RSP +4.14%同步參與，VIX −1.04、高收益利差−0.17平穩。唯一裂縫在加密與穩定幣：BTC −10.3%、穩定幣供給−2.32%，投機槓桿正流失，即便股票beta上漲。尚無吹哨式狂熱，但邊際投機資金已先撤離加密。

ai_mapping.summary_en: AI leadership is screaming: SOXX +28.79% vs SPX over 1m, AI continuation 80/100, supported by breadth (RSP−SPX +2.14, equal-weight participating) and a rising liquidity tide (RRP −96.52% drained into markets, HY OAS tightening, VIX falling). All three lenses align positive (liq 0.2, price 0.36, pos 0.38). This is broad-based risk-on, not a narrow blow-off — flows SUPPORT AI continuation. The yellow flag is crypto: BTC −10.3% and stablecoin supply −2.32% mean the speculative funding base is shrinking, which historically leads semis lower with a lag. Watch that the liquidity drain (TGA +5.02%, M2 flat) does not starve the tide.
ai_mapping.summary_zh: AI領導力強勁：SOXX相對SPX一個月+28.79%，AI延續訊號80/100，並獲廣度（RSP−SPX +2.14、等權參與）與流動性潮汐（RRP −96.52%釋出、高收益利差收窄、VIX下行）支撐。三鏡頭一致偏多（流動性0.2、價格0.36、部位0.38）。屬廣基risk-on而非窄幅噴出，資金面支持AI延續。黃旗在加密：BTC −10.3%、穩定幣−2.32%顯示投機資金基礎收縮，歷史上常領先半導體回落。需留意TGA +5.02%、M2持平的抽水不致掐斷潮汐。

thesis.direction_en: Bullish on AI continuation, but trim conviction on the crypto/liquidity-drain divergence
thesis.direction_zh: 看多AI延續，但因加密與抽水背離降低信念

leading_signals.en: Stablecoin supply growth (USDT+USDC) — re-acceleration confirms speculative funding returning; continued −2%+ contraction leads semis lower
leading_signals.zh: 穩定幣供給增速——重新加速確認投機資金回流；持續−2%以上收縮領先半導體下跌

leading_signals.en: RRP / TGA balance — RRP exhausted means the easy liquidity tailwind is ending; TGA rebuild above +5% drains net liquidity
leading_signals.zh: RRP／TGA餘額——RRP耗盡代表流動性順風將結束；TGA回補逾+5%抽乾淨流動性

leading_signals.en: HY OAS spread — any widening >25bp from current tight level fronts a risk regime shift
leading_signals.zh: 高收益OAS利差——自當前低位走闊逾25bp預示風險體制轉變

leading_signals.en: Equal-weight breadth (RSP−SPX) — if it rolls from +2.14 toward negative, leadership narrows and rally is fragile
leading_signals.zh: 等權廣度（RSP−SPX）——若自+2.14轉負，領導面收窄、漲勢脆弱

leading_signals.en: SOXX−SPX leadership slope — deceleration from +26.79 is the first AI-specific crack
leading_signals.zh: SOXX−SPX領導斜率——自+26.79減速是AI專屬的首道裂縫

scenarios.trigger_en: Net liquidity flat/rising + breadth ≥0 (RSP−SPX held) + HY OAS <3.5% + SOXX leadership stays >+15%
scenarios.trigger_zh: 淨流動性持平/上升＋廣度≥0（RSP−SPX維持）＋高收益OAS<3.5%＋SOXX領導>+15%

scenarios.trigger_en: SOXX−SPX falls below +10% while RSP/IWM hold positive and breadth broadens
scenarios.trigger_zh: SOXX−SPX跌破+10%，同時RSP/IWM維持正值且廣度擴散

scenarios.name_zh: 加密主導資金緊縮→吹哨期
scenarios.trigger_en: Stablecoin supply −5%+ and BTC −20% with RRP exhausted + TGA rebuild draining net liquidity
scenarios.trigger_zh: 穩定幣−5%以上、BTC −20%，RRP耗盡＋TGA回補抽乾淨流動性

scenarios.trigger_en: HY OAS widens >50bp + VIX >22 + net liquidity contracting
scenarios.trigger_zh: 高收益OAS走闊>50bp＋VIX>22＋淨流動性收縮

falsification.en: HY OAS widens >50bp while VIX breaks above 22 — credit and vol no longer calm, bullish thesis invalidated
falsification.zh: 高收益OAS走闊>50bp且VIX突破22——信用與波動不再平穩，多頭論點失效

falsification.en: Breadth flips: RSP−SPX turns negative AND SOXX leadership collapses below +5% simultaneously — rally was narrow and is failing
falsification.zh: 廣度翻轉：RSP−SPX轉負且SOXX領導同時跌破+5%——漲勢窄且正在瓦解

falsification.en: Institution appetite drops below retail (divergence flips positive >+5) — smart money distributing into retail strength
falsification.zh: 機構情緒跌破散戶（背離翻正>+5）——機構向散戶派發

early_warning.en: Stablecoin supply + BTC — speculative funding base, moves first
early_warning.zh: 穩定幣供給＋BTC——投機資金基礎，最先變動

early_warning.en: RRP drawdown / TGA rebuild — liquidity tide turning
early_warning.zh: RRP耗盡／TGA回補——流動性潮汐轉向

early_warning.en: VIX and HY OAS spread — vol/credit calm-but-turning
early_warning.zh: VIX與高收益OAS利差——波動/信用平靜但轉折

early_warning.en: Retail vs institution divergence — distribution check
early_warning.zh: 散戶與機構背離——派發檢查

channels.trigger_zh: 風險偏好上升 / 降息
貨幣基金殖利率升 / 恐慌
實質利率下降 / 貶值疑慮
AI 論點轉強 / capex 加速

channels.trigger_en: Rotation out of AI / breadth broadens
channels.trigger_zh: 資金輪出 AI / 廣度擴散
全球 risk-off / 美元避險

tap.name_zh: 全市場流動性(主水龍頭)
tap.desc_en: Net liquidity = Fed balance sheet − reverse repo − Treasury General Account. The tide that lifts or sinks every reservoir at once.
tap.desc_zh: 淨流動性 = Fed 資產負債表 − 逆回購 − 財政部帳戶(TGA)。同時抬升或下沉所有蓄水池的潮汐。

blind_spots_en: No direct institutional positioning (CFTC COT, BofA FMS cash, 13F) in the free layer — inferred from price/credit/vol proxies.
Retail behavior (0DTE options, AAII, margin debt) is proxied by BTC/ARKK/IWM, not measured directly.
Fund-flow (ETF creations/redemptions) not yet wired — would sharpen the reservoir-level read.
blind_spots_zh: 免費層沒有機構部位直接數據(CFTC COT、BofA FMS 現金、13F)——以價格/信用/波動代理推斷。
散戶行為(0DTE 選擇權、AAII、margin debt)以 BTC/ARKK/IWM 代理,非直接量測。
ETF 申購/贖回的資金流尚未接入——接上後可銳化蓄水池層的判讀。
